TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
NOTE: NON-PAYMENT OF RENT CASE ONLY; DEFTS NO LONGER IN POSSESSION.
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON AUG-12-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: 5-7-96 ENTRY RE SETTLEMENT OF CASE APPARENTLY IN ERROR. PLTF APPEARED AT SETTLEMENT CONF AND STATED THAT CASE HAD NEVER BEEN SETTLED AND THAT HE HAD NOT HAD CONTACT WITH DEFTS IN SOME TIME. DEFTS ARE NOT PRESENT; JURY DEMANDS ARE STRICKEN.
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08

JUDGE CHARLES AGUILAR COURT RPTR. D. PADILLA CLERK J. WEIR COURT CALLED TO ORDER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS IN PROPER. CASE SETTLED AND PUT ON THE RECORD PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALDERON, LEONIDAS CALDERON, CONCHA CALDERON, CARLOS CALDERON, JORGE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00, TO BE PAID $100 PER MONTH COMMENCING SEPT 1, 1996 AND SHALL CONTINUE BEING PAID ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UN- TIL PAID IN FULL. IF PAYMENT NOT RECEIVED BY THE 15TH OF THE MONTH DUE, THE ENTIRE UNPAID BALANCE SHALL BECOME DUE AND PAYABLE FORTHWITH. SEE FILE FOR FURTHER JUDGMENT
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
